info.title: NugetDocsMcp
info.description: A tool for finding documentation for locally-installed NuGet packages. Works as both a CLI tool and MCP server.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: NuGet Docs MCP - Find documentation for locally-installed NuGet packages.

commands.name: readme
commands.description: Get the README for a NuGet package.

commands.name: search
commands.description:
Search XML docs by member name. Query matches case-insensitively
against the member name (e.g. "GetProviderForResource" or
"ResourceManager.GetProviderForResource").

commands.name: types
commands.description: List all types in a package (just names, no details).

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify package version (auto-resolves if only one exists)

options.name: --framework
options.description:
Specify target framework (auto-resolves if only one exists)
MCP Mode:
nd --mcp           Start as an MCP server (stdio transport)
